prevalence.value: ~4-10% (adults; higher in women and older adults)
prevalence.trend: stable; detection increases with routine TSH testing

burden.dalyPerCapita: low; potential progression to overt hypothyroidism

epidemiology.diagnosticCriteria: Elevated TSH with normal free T4; repeat testing and assess thyroid antibodies

publicHealthSystem.controlRate: High with monitoring and selective treatment

regionalSpecificities.treatmentProtocol: Observation for mild cases; levothyroxine for symptomatic or high TSH
regionalSpecificities.strongPoints: Clear guidelines and access to monitoring
